mapper.select: select s.session_id as sessionId, coalesce( ( select h2.content from `history` h2 where h2.user_id = #{userId} and h2.session_id = s.session_id and h2.role = 'user' order by h2.create_time asc, h2.id asc limit 1 ), '新会话' ) as title, count(1) as messageCount, sum(case when s.role = 'user' then 1 else 0 end) as questionCount, max(s.create_time) as updatedAt from `history` s where s.user_id = #{userId} group by s.session_id order by updatedAt desc limit #{limit}
